已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case

decision.archive_summary: Minor GC regression work was completed in this thread. The repo now includes repeatable fixed live eval coverage for GC-D2 and a harder Chinese dense multi-topic return case (`codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return`). The implementation was adjusted to allow guarded relation `continue`, while packaged guard behavior was tightened so it cannot override a shadow-guard veto, addressing the user's concern about whitelist-like hardcoding. The assistant then reran the automatically runnable live eval via `node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown` and reported it passing/green.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic stayed the same throughout and appears resolved by the final assistant report that the runnable test was executed and passed. Earlier turns are implementation/progress snapshots for the same completed task, so they are good eviction candidates. The key durable context worth preserving is the semantic outcome: what regression coverage was added, what guard logic changed, the anti-whitelist preference, and that the runnable eval was rerun successfully.
